_publications._publicationTitle: Hybridization Capture-Based Next-Generation Sequencing to Evaluate Coding Sequence and Deep Intronic Mutations in the NF1 Gene.

_contextSnippet: Sanger sequencing confirmed all the mutations identified by NGS, showing that there were no false positive variants from pseudogenes reads
details: Sanger sequencing confirmed all mutations identified by NGS, showing no false positive variants from pseudogenes reads
